SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.scaffold

Class JkScaffold

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.scaffold.JkScaffold
Direct Known Subclasses:
JkBaseScaffold, JkProjectScaffold
public abstract class JkScaffold extends Object
Object that process scaffolding.

  • Method Details

    • addJekaPropsContent

      public JkScaffold addJekaPropsContent(String extraContent)

    • addJekaPropValue

      public JkScaffold addJekaPropValue(String propValue)
      Adds a property to scaffolded jeka.properties by specifying a string with format "prop.name=prop.value".

    • setJekaVersion

      public JkScaffold setJekaVersion(String jekaVersion)

    • setRawJekaPropsPath

      public JkScaffold setRawJekaPropsPath(Path rawJekaPropsPath)
      Sets the path of a file that will be copied to jeka.properties.

      If such a path is set, all other settings related to jeka.properties generation are ignored and the content of jeka.properties will be exactly the same as the specified file.

    • setJekaDistribRepo

      public JkScaffold setJekaDistribRepo(String jekaDistribRepo)

    • setJekaDistribLocation

      public JkScaffold setJekaDistribLocation(String jekaDistribLocation)

    • findLatestStableVersion

      public String findLatestStableVersion(String moduleCoordinate, String defaultVersion)
      Finds the latest version for a given module coordinate. If the latest version cannot be found or an exception occurs, the method returns the default version.
      Parameters:
      moduleCoordinate - the coordinate of the module for which to find the latest version
      defaultVersion - the default version to be returned if the latest version cannot be found

    • getJUnitDeps

      protected List<String> getJUnitDeps()

    • getJekaVersion

      protected String getJekaVersion()

    • run

      protected void run()
      Runs the scaffolding, meaning folder structure, build class, props file and .gitignore

    • lastJekaVersion

      public final String lastJekaVersion()
      Returns the last version of the Jeka module.

      This method searches for versions of the Jeka module in the specified download repositories. It filters out any snapshot versions and returns the last non-snapshot version found. If no versions are found, it logs a warning message and returns the current Jeka version.

      Returns:
      the last version of the Jeka module

    • setJekaPropsCustomizer

      public JkScaffold setJekaPropsCustomizer(UnaryOperator<String> customizer)
      Gives a chance to override the final jeka.properties file

    • addFileEntry

      public final void addFileEntry(String relativePath, String content)
      Adds a file entry to the list of file entries in the scaffold. The file entry consists of a relative path and its content. The file entry will be created or updated when the scaffold is run.

    • removeFileEntriesStartingWith

      public final void removeFileEntriesStartingWith(Path pathPrefix)
      Removes the file entries that start with the specified path prefix.

    • removeFileEntry

      public void removeFileEntry(String relativePath)
      Removes a file entry from the list of file entries. This gives a chance to plugins to remove the non-necessary files.
      Parameters:
      relativePath - the path, relative to base dir.

    • readResource

      public static String readResource(Class<?> clazz, String resourceName)
      Returns the content of a resource file as a string.

    • createShellScripts

      public static void createShellScripts(Path baseDir)
      Creates or replaces shell scripts in the specified base directory, meaning jeka.ps1 and jeka bash scripts.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - the base directory where the shell scripts will be created or replaced.
